items.name: Javelin
items.summary: A light thrown spear, useful at range before closing to melee.

items.name: Knife
items.summary: A small, easily concealed blade favored for its Discreet trait.

items.name: Mace
items.summary: A blunt light weapon that rewards charging into melee.

items.name: Rapier
items.summary: A quick blade suited to a defensive fighting style.

items.name: Shortspear
items.summary: A two-handed spear that experts learn to wield one-handed.

items.name: Sidesword
items.summary: A balanced blade well-suited to dual-wielding.

items.name: Staff
items.summary: An unassuming two-handed weapon that doubles as a walking stick.

items.name: Shortbow
items.summary: A compact two-handed bow favored by those who value a quick draw.

items.name: Sling
items.summary: A simple, easily hidden ranged weapon that can arc shots over cover.

items.name: Axe
items.summary: A versatile heavy weapon that can also be thrown.

items.name: Greatsword
items.summary: A massive two-handed blade capable of lethal strikes.

items.name: Hammer
items.summary: A heavy two-handed bludgeon that rewards charging attacks.

items.name: Longspear
items.summary: A two-handed spear whose long haft extends its reach.

items.name: Longsword
items.summary: A two-handed blade that experts learn to wield one-handed.

items.name: Poleaxe
items.summary: A two-handed polearm whose reach extends further for experts.

items.name: Shield
items.summary: A defensive weapon that lets its wielder Brace without nearby cover.

items.name: Crossbow
items.summary: A slow-loading but deadly two-handed ranged weapon.

items.name: Longbow
items.summary: A long-ranged two-handed bow that can arc shots over cover.

items.name: Improvised Weapon
items.summary: Any object pressed into service as a weapon, treated as whichever non-special weapon it most resembles.

items.name: Unarmed Attack
items.summary: Punches, kicks, and other strikes made without a weapon; damage scales with the attacker's Strength score.

items.name: Half-Shard
items.summary: A diamond-shaped kite shield with an augmenter fabrial on its back that can resist Shardblade strikes.

items.name: Shardblade
items.summary: A priceless Invested weapon that cuts through nearly anything and severs a struck target's spirit rather than their flesh.

items.name: Shardblade (Radiant)
items.summary: A living Shardblade bonded to a Radiant of the Third Ideal or higher, summoned instantly and reshapeable into any non-special melee weapon.

items.name: Warhammer
items.summary: An enormous two-handed hammer, commonly called a Shardhammer, typically wielded only by those in Shardplate.

items.name: Grandbow
items.summary: A massive two-handed bow whose expert shots pierce straight through a target's deflect value.

items.name: Uniform
items.summary: Everyday attire that's presentable in polite, non-military settings.

items.name: Leather
items.summary: Light protective armor; experts can wear it without drawing unwanted attention.

items.name: Chain
items.summary: Interlocking metal rings; experts can wear it regardless of Strength.

items.name: Breastplate
items.summary: A solid metal chestpiece that experts can wear in polite company.

items.name: Half Plate
items.summary: Partial plate armor that's slightly easier for experts to wear.

items.name: Full Plate
items.summary: Heavy, full-body metal armor.

items.name: Shardplate
items.summary: Legendary Invested full-body armor that enhances its wearer's Strength and Speed and can regenerate damaged plates over time.

items.name: Shardplate (Radiant)
items.summary: Living Shardplate composed of common spren, bonded to a Radiant of the Fourth Ideal or higher and summoned or dismissed piece by piece.

items.name: Alerter
items.summary: Detects approaching people or objects within a radius the crafter tunes, blinking to alert its owner; spends 1 charge per day active.

items.name: Attractor
items.summary: Weakly attracts a chosen Essence or material toward itself within a radius while active; spends 1 charge per hour active.

items.name: Clock Fabrial
items.summary: Tracks and displays the exact time, whether mounted on a building or worn as jewelry; spends 1 charge every 5 days active.

items.name: Drainer
items.summary: Touched to an Invested or infused target to drain 1 Investiture or charge from it while gaining a charge itself.

items.name: Emotion Bracelet
items.summary: Blinks or changes color in the presence of different emotions; its wearer can spend a charge for an advantage reading someone nearby.

items.name: Freechair
items.summary: A levitating mobility device with unlimited charges; disabled characters can obtain one for free without tracking charges.

items.name: Heatrial
items.summary: Generates adjustable ambient heat or cooking-level heat, though touching its gemstone while active deals energy damage.

items.name: Painrial (Amplifying)
items.summary: A Light Weaponry melee fabrial that deals 1d6 vital damage and can spend a charge to add its wielder's skill modifier to the damage again on a hit.

items.name: Painrial (Numbing)
items.summary: Dulls its wearer's sense of pain; before taking damage, they can spend a charge to reduce it by 1d4.

items.name: Repeller
items.summary: Weakly pushes a chosen Essence or material away from itself within a radius while active; spends 1 charge per hour active.

items.name: Soulcaster
items.summary: Mimics the Transformation surge, letting a non-Radiant turn matter into the single Essence the fabrial's three gemstones are linked to.

items.name: Spanreed (1 pair)
items.summary: A paired writing instrument tipped with an infused ruby, letting its bonded partner hold a written conversation across any distance while both are stationary.

items.name: Suppressor
items.summary: Suppresses surge use and Radiant Shardblade or Shardplate summoning within a 30-foot radius, keyed to either Stormlight or Voidlight users.

items.name: Alcohol (1 serving)
items.summary: Rosharan alcohol, known in Vorin society as "wine" and named by color, ranging from the barely intoxicating pink to the potent violet.

items.name: Alcohol (bottle)
items.summary: A bottle of Rosharan alcohol; the same color-graded range of intoxication as a single serving.

items.name: Anesthetic (5 doses)
items.summary: Applied to an injury after a rest to reduce its recovery time by 1d4 days; each injury can only be treated once per day.

items.name: Antiseptic (potent, 5 doses)
items.summary: Applied to a character after a short rest to restore 2d6 health.

items.name: Antiseptic (weak, 5 doses)
items.summary: Applied to a character after a short rest to restore 1d6 health.

items.name: Backpack
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Barrel
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Blanket
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Book (reference)
items.summary: Referencing this book while testing Intellect on a related topic counts as having an expertise in that topic.

items.name: Bottle (crem)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Bottle (glass)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Bucket
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Candle
items.summary: Sheds light in a 15-foot radius for up to 6 hours before burning out.

items.name: Case (leather)
items.summary: A sealable, cylindrical case that stores and protects up to ten pages of paper or parchment.

items.name: Chain (thick, 10 feet)
items.summary: A sturdy chain for securing cargo or prisoners; breaks on a DC 30 Athletics test or 15 damage.

items.name: Chain (thin, 1 foot)
items.summary: A fine chain often used in jewelry and Soulcasters; breaks on a DC 20 Athletics test or 5 damage.

items.name: Chest
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Clothing (common)
items.summary: Plain, affordable clothing that grants an advantage on spiritual tests to pass as lower class.

items.name: Clothing (fine)
items.summary: Fine, expensive clothing that grants an advantage on spiritual tests to pass as upper class.

items.name: Clothing (ragged)
items.summary: Threadbare clothing that grants an advantage on spiritual tests to pass as destitute.

items.name: Crowbar
items.summary: Grants an advantage on Athletics tests where its leverage applies.

items.name: Ear Trumpet
items.summary: Lets distant sounds be heard as though from half the distance.

items.name: Flask or Tankard
items.summary: A simple drinking vessel; the book lists no mechanical effect beyond its use as a container.

items.name: Flint and Steel
items.summary: Used as an action to light abundant fuel within reach; starting a fire under harder circumstances can take longer.

items.name: Food (ration, 1 day)
items.summary: Bland travel food, such as jerky or hard-baked cakes, that stays edible indefinitely if kept dry.

items.name: Food (street, 1 day)
items.summary: Cheap, culturally distinct street food, such as Herdazian chouta.

items.name: Food (fine, 1 day)
items.summary: High-class food found at noble feasts and fine restaurants.

items.name: Grappling Hook
items.summary: Grants an advantage on climbing tests when securely anchored, and can be thrown to an anchor point within 20 feet.

items.name: Hammer (handheld)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Ink (1-ounce bottle)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Ink Pen
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Jug or Pitcher
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Ladder (10-foot)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Lantern (oil)
items.summary: While lit, sheds light in a 30-foot radius and burns for up to 6 hours per pint of oil.

items.name: Lantern (sphere)
items.summary: A locked cage lantern for infused spheres, shedding a radius of light from 5 to 60 feet depending on how full it is.

items.name: Lock and Key
items.summary: Can be opened with its included key or a successful DC 20 Thievery test.

items.name: Lockpick
items.summary: Grants an advantage on Thievery tests to pick a lock, but the GM can spend a Complication to break it after the test.

items.name: Magnifying Lens
items.summary: Grants an advantage on skill tests made to appraise or inspect a small or highly detailed item.

items.name: Manacles
items.summary: Metal restraints for a Large or smaller character, escaped with a DC 25 Agility test, broken with a DC 25 Athletics test or 15 damage, or picked with a DC 20 Thievery test.

items.name: Mirror (handheld)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Musical Instrument
items.summary: Playing one calls for a skill test tied to the instrument's style to determine performance quality; an expertise in the instrument grants an advantage.

items.name: Net (hunting)
items.summary: Used to make an Athletics attack that Restrains and knocks Prone a Large or smaller target within 15 feet.

items.name: Net (fishing)
items.summary: Grants an advantage on physical tests related to fishing.

items.name: Oil (1 flask)
items.summary: Fuels oil lanterns, creates dangerous terrain, or can be thrown as an improvised sling weapon that coats the target in flammable oil.

items.name: Paper or Parchment (1 sheet)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Perfume (1 vial)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Pick (mining)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Poison (weak, 1 dose)
items.summary: Applied to food, a weapon, or ammunition; the target must succeed on a DC 12 Athletics test or take 1d6 vital damage.

items.name: Poison (effectual, 1 dose)
items.summary: Applied to food, a weapon, or ammunition; the target must succeed on a DC 14 Athletics test or take 2d8 vital damage and be Stunned for 1 hour.

items.name: Poison (potent, 1 dose)
items.summary: Applied to food, a weapon, or ammunition; the target must succeed on a DC 16 Athletics test or take 3d10 vital damage and be Stunned and Immobilized for 1 hour.

items.name: Pot (iron)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Pouch
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Pulley System
items.summary: Set up before lifting an object to treat it as a quarter of its normal weight.

items.name: Rope (50 feet)
items.summary: Cut by dealing 2 damage to it, or ripped apart with a successful DC 20 Athletics test.

items.name: Sack
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Scale
items.summary: Accurately determines the weight of an object up to 2 pounds.

items.name: Shovel
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Soap
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Spyglass
items.summary: Lets distant objects be viewed as though from half the distance.

items.name: Surgical Supplies
items.summary: A 10-use satchel; expending a use grants an advantage on a Medicine test to treat a wounded character.

items.name: Tent (two-person)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Treatment (medical, 1 dose)
items.summary: Used during a short rest to cure Disoriented, Stunned, or reduce Exhausted's penalty by 1, provided the source isn't a permanent injury.

items.name: Tuning Fork
items.summary: Transfers Stormlight between spheres and gemstones, letting spheres recharge fabrials, Shardplate, or half-shards as if they were unencased gems.

items.name: Unencased Gem (infused)
items.summary: Leaks Stormlight faster than a sphere but can recharge fabrials and Shardplate, or be breathed in by Radiants just like a sphere.

items.name: Vial (glass)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Waterskin
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Wax (1 block)
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.

items.name: Whetstone
items.summary: Listed for roleplaying purposes only — it has no specific statistics or mechanical rules.
